zh.lifeSummary: Margaret Douglas於大約1388年出生在英國蘇格蘭藍納可爾道格拉斯。她和6th Chief of Clan MacLeod Iain Borb MacLeod至少有3個兒子和3個女兒。她去世於1448年在英國蘇格蘭音巴內-爾登維根享年61歲，埋葬在蘇格蘭。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Margaret Douglas于大约1388年出生在英国苏格兰藍納可爾道格拉斯。她和6th Chief of Clan MacLeod Iain Borb MacLeod至少有3个儿子和3个女儿。她去世于1448年在英国苏格兰音巴內-爾登維根享年61岁，埋葬在苏格兰。

nameMeanings.name: Douglas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish: habitational name from any of various places called from their situation on a river named with Gaelic dubh ‘dark, black’ + glas ‘stream’ (a derivative of glas ‘blue’). There are several localities in Scotland and Ireland so named, but the one from which the surname is derived in most if not all cases is Douglas in Lanarkshire 20 miles south of Glasgow, the original stronghold of the influential Douglas family and their retainers.

History: The family taking their name from Douglas in Lanarkshire were of Flemish origin. They rose to great prominence in the 14th and 15th centuries, controlling the earldoms of Douglas, Morton, and Angus, and later, Queensberry.

variants.name: Douglass
meanings: Scottish and English (Durham and Northumbria): variant of   Douglas  .

History: William Douglass, a physician recognized for his identification and description of an epidemic of scarlet fever, was born c. 1691 in Gifford, Haddington County, Scotland, and settled in Boston in 1718. The abolitionist, orator, and journalist Frederick Douglass assumed the name after escaping from slavery in 1838 and traveling to Massachusetts. Son of a white father and a slave with some Indian blood, he was born Frederick Augustus Washington Bailey c. 1817 in Tuckahoe, MD.

nameMeanings.name: Margaret
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margareta
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

variants.name: Margaretta
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

en.lifeSummary: Margaret Douglas was born about 1388, in Douglas, Lanarkshire, Scotland, United Kingdom. She had at least 3 sons and 3 daughters with 6th Chief of Clan MacLeod Iain Borb MacLeod. She died in 1448, in Dunvegan, Inverness-shire, Scotland, United Kingdom, at the age of 61, and was buried in Scotland.

fr.lifeSummary: Margaret Douglas est née environ 1388, à Douglas, Lanarkshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni. Elle a eu au moins 3 fils et 3 filles avec 6th Chief of Clan MacLeod Iain Borb MacLeod. Elle est décédée en 1448, à Dunvegan, Inverness-shire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 61 ans, et a été enterrée à Écosse.

de.lifeSummary: Margaret Douglas wurde um 1388 in Douglas, Lanarkshire, Schottland, United Kingdom geboren. Sie hatte mit 6th Chief of Clan MacLeod Iain Borb MacLeod mindestens 3 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb 1448 im Alter von 61 Jahren in Dunvegan, Inverness-shire, Schottland, United Kingdom und wurde in Scotland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Margaret Douglas è nata il circa 1388 nel Douglas, Lanarkshire, Scozia, Regno Unito. Lei avuto almeno 3 figli e 3 figlie con 6th Chief of Clan MacLeod Iain Borb MacLeod. Morì nel 1448, nel Dunvegan, Inverness-shire, Scozia, Regno Unito, all'età di 61 anni, e fu sepolta a Scotland.

ja.lifeSummary: Margaret Douglasは約1388年にイギリススコットランドラナルクシュアイアドウグラスで生まれた。彼女は6th Chief of Clan MacLeod Iain Borb MacLeodとの間に少なくとも3人の息子と3人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1448年にイギリススコットランドインバーネス-シュアイアダンベガンで61歳で死去し，スコットランドにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Margaret Douglas(은)는 대략 1388년 영국 스코틀랜드 랜아르크실르 더글라스에서 태어났다. 그녀는 6th Chief of Clan MacLeod Iain Borb MacLeod(와)과 적어도 세 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1448년 영국 스코틀랜드 인버네스-실르 던베건에서 61세의 나이로 사망했으며 스컷랜드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Margaret Douglas nasceu aproximadamente 1388, em Douglas, Lanarkshire, Escócia, United Kingdom. Ela teve pelo menos 3 filhos e 3 filhas com 6th Chief of Clan MacLeod Iain Borb MacLeod. Ela faleceu em 1448, em Dunvegan, Inverness-shire, Escócia, United Kingdom, com 61 anos, e foi sepultada em Scotland.

ru.lifeSummary: Margaret Douglas родилась около 1388 г. в местности доуглас, ланаркшир, Шотландия, Великобритания. У неё было по крайней мере 3 сына и 3 дочери от 6th Chief of Clan MacLeod Iain Borb MacLeod. Она умерла в 1448 г. в местности дунвеган, инвирнесс-шир, Шотландия, Великобритания в возрасте 61 год и была похоронена в местности Шотландия.

es.lifeSummary: Margaret Douglas nació aproximadamente 1388, en Douglas, Lanarkshire, Escocia, Reino Unido. Tuvo por lo menos 3 hijos y 3 hijas con 6th Chief of Clan MacLeod Iain Borb MacLeod. Murió en 1448, en Dunvegan, Inverness-shire, Escocia, Reino Unido, a la edad de 61 años, y fue sepultada en Scotland.
